summary: The diff implements the extension of the 007 loading animation duration by slowing the CSS rotation animations (bond-rotate from 4s to 10s for outer ring, 14s for inner ring) and introducing a MIN_DISPLAY_MS constant of 4500ms that enforces a minimum visible duration for the InitialLoadingScreen. The progress bar is throttled to pace with this minimum time, ensuring the loading sequence still completes normally after the animation. These changes align well with REQ-1's acceptance criteria.
